prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-8INPOCKETKNIFE-EAG Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Folding Pocket Knife Patriotic Bald Eagle American Flag Collectible Gift, 8 Inch Description: Be prepared while exploring out in the wilderness in style with the ASR Outdoor Eagle Head Collectible Folding Pocket Knife.

This pocket knife features a patriotic bald eagle design with a majestic American flag on the handle. The clip point blade is constructed of durable steel, and is 3 inches in length. The knife unfolds to an overall length of 8 inches and folds to a length of just 5 inches, making it the perfect size for everyday carry in your jean pocket, small bag or backpack when not in use.

The handle features a comfortable ergonomic design, that fits perfectly in the palm of your hand. This is a must-have pocket knife for hunters, campers, knife collectors and patriots alike. Search Terms: USA american rebel flag stuff patriotic bald eagle native Indian collectible gift for men collector set pocket hunting knives folding clip point blade dad outdoorsman under 10 soaring wilderness birds knife Features: - AMERICAN FLAG POCKET KNIFE: A patriotic gift for men featuring a Bald Eagle theme with the stars and stripes of the USA flag on the handle; perfect for anyones knife collection, a pocket knife for men featuring a detailed eagle head on the pommel - FOLDING POCKET KNIFE SIZE: Unfolds to 8 inches overall; 5 inches folded; 3 inch clip point blade; ideal American flag knife for pockets, backpacks and makes a great gift for men stocking stuiffers for Christmas - QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: Made of durable stainless steel that wont rust; great for hunting and camping; handle features a decorative animal head pommel at the base made from ABS - LOCKING MECHANISM: Simple back lock mechanism that allows the blade to be locked in place and unlocked to fold up; smooth and easy to open and close; low maintenance lubrication will allow for a long life of use from this pocket knife - USA FLAG COLLECTIBLE KNIFE: High quality American bald eagle theme with the American flag design; Great for gift presentation === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 8 Inch Patriotic Bald Eagle Folding Pocket Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: American Flag Design, 3 Inch Clip Point Blade, Folds To 5 Inches, Stainless Steel, Back Lock Mechanism, Collectible Gift
